i came back after a break from morimens since i couldnt beat it
monotawil is my current team

if you don't want to just brute force with gnosis here is a pro tip

the last red squares before the boss are special, they give a huge amount of max hp

u can easily walk into the boss fight with like 4k hp (more with gluttony) and the boss is not so scary anymore

monowil should have more than enough damage to clear, the main thing is to pay attention to the mechanics, don't play cards that are going to get dissoluted, etc
I would suggest using emergency gnosis though, pride aside, you don't get anything for beating it deathless
its just less of a pain in the ass

i finally got mouch e2 since i couldnt get her e3 and sig wheel since my luck keeps beating me up
any advice on how to build them?
im thinking of replacing aigis with faint so i could increase death res for mouch

put analysis of death on mouchette (sr wheel)

the rest look fine

in arc 1 you maybe want costco to buy cursed relics but its not a huge deal

mouchette only counts her own death resist for scaling, so faint doesn't make her deal more damage or anything. faint is still just letting you proc dr more times, same as usual
should i replace the ssr wheel with analysis of death or the second SR sig wheel?
the signature wheel, it's not that helpful for her
compared to more crit and aliemus refund
can u recommend any cov for mouch?
crimson pulse is cheap and good
some run april tribute or dreams of medicine
dreams makes your burst setups more consistent but obviously it gives no crit
so you have to make it up with wheels and buffs from teammates
it also drains your bank account 🥀 no black sigils
wat abt her death res scaling? since i dont have lily's or her sig wheel
will i still deal high dmg?
i can try to get death res from cov tho
but idk if dats enough
in covenant substats, death res and crit are roughly equal
in wheel investment crit wheels are better than trying to all in on death resist
if a death resist wheel also has crit, like lily wheel, then its good
the dr scaling is not so high that u should neglect crit rate though
pure death resist build is less damage
i dont recommend building death resist covenant set specifically for mouchette because who has the money for that
just slap your regular crit stuff on her and its more than enough to clear the hardest content in game

miryam is basically a support for someone else, she gives them aliemus + healing + vuln/weak. she can go in any team really as long as the dps wants what she's selling
sanga and tulu are both good teammates because they benefit from exalting a lot
but you can also run something like lotan ramona caecus and then have miryam as the 4th
shes just generically useful

I feel so overwhelmed

one route would be Doresain, he is a good low investment dps, you'll get aigis for free after clearing Aqueor lightless if I remember correctly, Faint is stellar with low investment and fine for that squad then pair with whatever really ngl preferably something with more vulnerable application.  Wouldn't be bad to throw chaos units in there for the 100% death resist base, not necessary though (resisting the urge to say build Daff in that squad)

To clear the Aqueor one I'd just throw Miryam with Horus, Ogier and Ramona for an easy time.
Though mouchette can do some aqueor memes but more expensive to level than ramona/ogier, you really don't need to replace the starters for quite some time to get easy clears.
chat ive been using tawil with mouchette helot and aigis and its working like a clock

i know she does pack a very high aliemus and a nice crit damage, and crit chance
and faros works with machette cuz she pretty much can search for the cards and has a constant draw of more cards
If you dont have a lot of crit rate set up then crimson pulse is nice. Dreams is good if you arent running thais, and April is apparently the go to for super invested mouch.

Tbf you can use pretty much anything with Mouchette Helot Aigis <a:NellGiggle:966097232837361694>
for main stat you pick between 2x crit 3x death resistance or 3x crit 2x death resistance. i'd do 3x crit unless you can hit absurdly high personal death res
